tests.title: inscription

err.message:
CypressError: `cy.task('writeAllureResults')` failed with the following error:

The task 'writeAllureResults' was not handled in the setupNodeEvents method. The following tasks are registered: reportAllureCypressSpecMessages, reportFinalAllureCypressSpecMessages

Fix this in your setupNodeEvents method here:
D:\Documents\Logwire\cypress projects\glowria\cypress.config.js

https://on.cypress.io/api/task

Because this error occurred during a `after all` hook we are skipping all of the remaining tests.
